name: Scrum
description: Plan, track, and manage work across sprints with a structured agile workflow.
features: Sprint planning to organize work into fixed-length iterations
Backlog management to prioritize stories, bugs, and upcoming work
Timeline visibility for the bigger picture and dependency tracking
Structured delivery with regular sprint reviews and progress tracking
detailedInfo:
Scrum is ideal for teams that deliver work in a regular cadence using sprints.

How it works:
- Work is collected in a backlog
- The team selects work for a sprint
- Tasks move through the board during execution
- Progress is reviewed at the end of each sprint

Best for:
- Product development
- Agile software teams
- Iterative feature delivery

name: Kanban
description: Visualize and manage work with a continuous flow system built around board columns.
features: Continuous delivery without fixed sprint cycles
Work in progress limits to expose bottlenecks early
Visual board workflow for easy task movement and visibility
Cycle time tracking to measure delivery speed
detailedInfo:
Kanban is designed for teams that need a flexible and continuous workflow.

How it works:
- Tasks are added to the board backlog or queue
- Work moves steadily from left to right
- WIP limits help reduce overload
- Tasks are completed continuously instead of in sprint batches

Best for:
- Support teams
- Operations work
- Maintenance and ongoing delivery

name: Event calendar
description: Plan, organize, and track all your important activities in one centralized visual calendar.
features: Calendar view to see work by day, week, or month
Timeline view to track milestones and overlapping schedules
Board view to manage event progress across stages
List view to review and update all planned activities quickly
detailedInfo:
The event calendar template helps teams organize and manage events of any size in one place.

How it works:
- Add meetings, launches, campaigns, or internal events
- Schedule them on a shared visual calendar
- Track progress and changes across supporting views
- Keep deadlines, owners, and milestones visible to everyone

Best for:
- Marketing teams
- Project planning
- Company events and launches
